entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants used for food production that can be genetically transformed

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO INSECT PESTS
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand attack by insect pests

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The composition of nutrients in a crop plant

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of an organism to confer specific traits

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Segments of DNA that can be cloned and inserted into plants

entities.name: HERBICIDE RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide plants with the ability to survive herbicide application

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Economic state of being extremely poor in rural areas

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: Lack of consistent access to enough food for an active, healthy life

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: Lack of essential nutrients in the diet

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS FACTORS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests and diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS FACTORS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors such as drought or salinity

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: A bacterium used to confer insect resistance in crops

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical or natural substances added to soil to increase fertility

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Substances used for destroying insects or other organisms harmful to cultivated plants

entities.name: BIOSAFETY REGULATIONS
entities.description: Rules and guidelines to ensure the safe handling and use of genetically modified organisms

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS OF THE RURAL POOR
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for people in rural poverty

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries with less developed industrial bases
